content.problemStatement:
**Problem Description: **Given an integer array nums, find the number of Longest Increasing Subsequences (LIS) in the array.

The Longest Increasing Subsequence (LIS) is the longest subsequence where all elements are in strictly increasing order.






Prerequisite:Longest increasing subsequence, Printing Longest Increasing subsequence





    
        <summary class="article_example_sum
content.inputFormat: The input is an integer array nums.
content.outputFormat: The output is the number of Longest Increasing Subsequences (LIS) in the array.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to track the length of the longest increasing subsequence ending at each position and the count of such subsequences.
